correct_code:
def digit_list(n):
    digits = []
    n = abs(n)
    while n > 0:
        digits.append(n % 10)
        n //= 10
    digits.reverse()
    return digits
buggy_code:
def digit_list(n):
    digits = []
    n = abs(n)
    while n > 0:
        digits.append(n % 10)
        n //= 10
    digits.reverse()
    return None
test_code:
assert digit_list(123) == [1, 2, 3]
assert digit_list(9) == [9]
assert digit_list(100) == [1, 0, 0]
